articles.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
articles.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

articles.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

articles.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
articles.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

articles.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
articles.summary: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

articles.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
articles.summary: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

articles.title: Three jailed over heist of ancient golden helmet from Dutch museum
articles.summary: The men are sentenced to 47 months each for stealing the 2,500-year-old Romanian Coțofenești helmet.

articles.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
articles.summary: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.

articles.title: US journalist pleads guilty to working as China's agent

articles.title: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
articles.summary: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.

articles.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction
articles.summary: Swampy mangrove forests are staging a surprise comeback - which is good news for coastal communities and the climate.
